prompt: Create a warm, detailed anime-style fantasy café interior scene at square 1:1 aspect ratio. Show exactly two main characters cleaning up after customers in a cozy wooden tavern with amber lamp lighting, shelves, framed art, a curtained window, tiled floor, and rustic tables. The first character is a cute pink-haired maid named Metan, centered-left and leaning forward while wiping a wooden table with a white cloth; she has bright blue eyes, long twin-tail pink hair in curled ringlets, a frilly black-and-white maid dress with pale pink ruffles, a heart ornament headband, black ribbons, puffed sleeves, a red bow tie, white stockings, and a gentle smile. The second character is a small green mascot-like girl named Zundamon, standing to the right and carrying a stack of plates; she has short leafy green hair, bean-pod-like ears, a green tail, green short overalls with suspenders over a white blouse, a purple ribbon at the collar, pink socks, green boots with purple accents, and her face is intentionally covered by a soft rectangular beige blur. Include exactly two background diners at a right-side table, both with indistinct blurred faces. On the tables and shelves include exactly three visible stacks of dirty white plates: one in the green character’s hands, one on the front-left table, and one in the foreground basket area; include exactly two wicker baskets in the foreground, one holding utensils and one holding plates; include one clear drinking glass near the wiped table, two colored crystal decorations on a shelf, one pink bottle at the far left, and one plush green mascot toy sitting on the left shelf. Use rich painterly anime rendering, soft depth of field, warm golden highlights, clean linework, expressive character design, and a busy but charming café-cleanup atmosphere. No text, no watermark.
